frame_analyses.description: Trainee positioned at FLS trainer, hands visible but no instruments in trainer yet
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Setup phase, instruments visible outside trainer

frame_analyses.description: Both instruments inserted, needle driver and grasper visible, suture thread visible
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good initial instrument positioning, timing starts here

frame_analyses.description: Needle being positioned near Penrose drain for first pass through marking
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Controlled approach to drain, good visualization

frame_analyses.description: Needle passing through drain at first mark, precise placement technique
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean needle pass, appears close to mark

frame_analyses.description: Working on second pass through drain at second mark
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Continuing suture placement, maintaining good control

frame_analyses.description: Beginning first throw formation, suture loops visible
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Starting knot tying sequence, appears to be forming double throw

frame_analyses.description: Completing first throw tightening, surgeon's knot formation
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good tension control, proper surgeon's knot technique

frame_analyses.description: Beginning second throw, switching hands from first throw
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper hand switching observed, maintaining knot security

frame_analyses.description: Tightening second throw, single throw technique
Beginning third throw formation, switching hands again
Scissors introduced for cutting suture ends
Task completed, knot secured and suture ends cut
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Final knot appears secure, drain slit well-closed

knot_assessments.notes: Proper surgeon's knot with double throw
Final throw with proper hand switching

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Drain slit properly closed with no visible gaps

technique_summary: Solid performance with proper knot sequence and hand switching. Suture placement showed minor deviations from marks but knot security was excellent.
improvement_suggestions: Work on more precise suture placement closer to marked targets
Continue to maintain the excellent knot tying technique
strengths: Good knot security and drain closure
